test.description: Regression test for #4281: overzoom seam at hillshade tile boundaries. Centred on the corner where the four z=12 terrain tiles (758,1608), (759,1608), (758,1609) and (759,1609) meet, rendered at z=13 with source maxzoom=12 so each tile is overzoomed by one level. Without the prepare-pass overshoot from #4282 the corner shows a visible cross of seam discontinuities; with the fix the slopes are continuous across the four tile boundaries.
